summary: Iteration 34 — Multi-issue fix bundle validated. Backend: 14/14 pytest PASS in ~52s. Frontend: dd-mm-yyyy date + 12h AM/PM time formatting verified across /roles, /interview-reports, /update-scores. BulkUploadModal toggles (Pending/Failed/Processed) render with correct data-testids and toggle expand/collapse correctly. Live SMTP + AiSensy WhatsApp confirmed working — '[Email] SENT' + 'campaign=Schedule Detail status=200' both observed in backend log within 2s of POST /api/pub/schedule/<token>. is_test=True correctly re-routes to rishi.nayak@blubridge.com / 9443109903; TEST_MODE env is now NO-OP as designed; real applicants get their own credentials. Time normalisation tested for 6 inputs (1:00 PM→13:00:00, 9:30 AM→09:30:00, 12:00 PM→12:00:00, 12:00 AM→00:00:00, 11 PM→23:00:00, 13:45→13:45:00). Registration → pipeline_data upsert verified end-to-end with college_type, _normalized_job_role, _nirf_category, submitted_at(yyyy-mm-dd HH:mm:ss), source='registration_form'. Backwards-compat: GET /api/summary returns total_registered=100798 exactly, /api/applicants and /api/data/classification both 200.

minor.issue: bb_modules.py lines 1348-1351 contain TWO consecutive `except Exception as e:` blocks for the same try. Python accepts this syntactically but the second except is unreachable dead code. Drop one. Not a functional issue.

messaging_routing: TEST_MODE=true env var is NO-OP (verified — real recipient passthrough even with env set)
registration_pipeline: POST /api/pub/register creates pipeline_data row with name, email, phone, age, college, college_type ('Non NIRF' or 'NIRF - #N'), degree, course, location, submitted_at (yyyy-mm-dd HH:mm:ss), source='registration_form', _normalized_job_role, _nirf_category
schedule_confirmation_fires_unconditiona: Backend log shows '[TEST_ROUTE] Overriding' → '[WhatsApp] campaign=Schedule Detail status=200' → '[Email] SENT to=rishi.nayak@blubridge.com' within 2s of schedule POST. Fires regardless of shortlist_mail_sent state. interview_mail_sent flag set to True after success.
frontend: BulkUploadModal opens via 'Bulk' button next to 'Upload Naukri Applies Dataset' on /dashboard. Modal has data-testid='bulk-modal'.
toggle-pending-btn PRESENT, default expanded (pending content visible). Click → collapses. Re-click → expands. CONFIRMED.
toggle-processed-btn PRESENT, default collapsed (no processed content visible). Click → expands. CONFIRMED.
toggle-failed-btn correctly NOT rendered when failed.length===0 (matches spec)

action_items: [MINOR] /app/backend/bb_modules.py lines 1348-1351: drop the duplicate `except Exception as e:` block (second one is unreachable). Not blocking.
[OBSERVATION] TEST_MODE=true is still set in /app/backend/.env even though it is now a no-op. Consider removing to avoid confusion.
critical_code_review_comments: bb_modules.py is now 1354 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline (also flagged in iter33). Recommend splitting into bb_imports.py / bb_pub.py / bb_otp.py.

register_applicant (~line 1180) does NOT tag pipeline_data with isTest; if main agent ever adds a 'test registration' path, the routing flag would not propagate. Currently only bb_registrations carries isTest.

schedule_interview catches a broad `except Exception` after notify_schedule_confirmation but DOES NOT log full traceback (only str(e)). For SMTP/AiSensy debugging in prod, log via _logger.exception() instead of _logger.error(f'... {e}').
bg_workers.py line ~412: per iter33 review, the 7-PM rejection-mail worker can be late by up to 1h after 19:00 UTC if early in the day. Acceptable but worth noting.
messaging.py SMTP_PASSWORD default in code ('zfdb buxc ehyq gctr') is leftover from previous credentials — remove the hardcoded fallback so .env is the only source of truth (defense-in-depth).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (formatters verified on 3 pages; BulkUploadModal toggles all working)

seed_data_creation: Created 7 docs in bb_registrations (test_iter34_*) and 2 docs in pipeline_data (test_iter34_*) during testing. ALL CLEANED UP via module-scope teardown fixture which delete_many({'email':{'$regex':'test_iter34_'}}) on both collections. Verified post-test counts return to baseline.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter34 confirmed live SMTP + AiSensy WhatsApp end-to-end (different from iter33 where SMTP was 535-failing). _resolve_recipient now ONLY routes on per-record is_test flag (or FORCE_TEST_MODE env emergency switch) — TEST_MODE env is no-op. POST /api/pub/schedule/<token> normalizes 12h AM/PM to 24h HH:MM:SS and unconditionally fires notify_schedule_confirmation if registered_at >= MESSAGING_CUTOFF_TS (currently 2026-05-04). POST /api/pub/register upserts to pipeline_data with derived fields. Frontend formatters in /app/frontend/src/utils/dateFormat.js (formatDateDDMMYYYY, formatTime12H) applied on Roles, AttendedDrillDown, InterviewReports, UpdateScores. BulkUploadModal data-testids: bulk-modal, toggle-pending-btn, toggle-failed-btn (only when failed.length>0), toggle-processed-btn. To run: `export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://recruit-pipeline-fix-1.preview.emergentagent.com && export $(grep -v '^#' /app/backend/.env | xargs) && pytest backend/tests/test_iteration34_messaging_pipeline.py -v`. Cleanup automatic.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp AiSensy: LIVE — returns 200 with submitted_message_id (verified in backend log)
mocked_apis.SMTP Gmail: LIVE — '[Email] SENT to=rishi.nayak@blubridge.com' verified (credentials apparently refreshed since iter33)

rca_of_the_issue: N/A — all features in scope verified working. No bugs RCA required.
